cardio.workout: Z1 easy 30 min continuous + 6×20 s strides (flat, controlled-fast)

targets.hr: ≤155 (off-191 zones; anchor by pace, not HR)

cardio.cooldown: 5 min easy jog/walk / Z1; Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15

currentLoads.note: Hold 145 — set 1 RIR 2 = cleanest opener of the top-of-LP hold (first-time RPE 7 match since Adj #94/#107), but sets 2-3 dropped reps 5→4 both RIR 0. Not a §5 miss — <24 h post Mon's 6-mi T progression (Adj #125), predicted fatigue-carryover shape. +5→150 gate still wants a cleaner set-3 RIR. TM 162 stands; next §5 re-test ~W12 (Adj #126)
160 bump partial — sets 1-2 held the 8-rep floor, sets 3-4 collapsed to 6 reps RIR 0, below the 4×8-10 floor. Hold-until-clean NOT met → hold 160, re-attempt clean set 3 (Adj #115)
First full 3-set outing since the reset; set 1 RIR 2 = first real headroom since the Adj #98 reset collapse, sets 2-3 to failure. Hold 75, rebuild progressing (Adj #116)

6-set growth dose; openers still soft (RIR 3/3/3/3), but back half tightening across the block — set 5 RIR 2 (vs W10 Tue RIR 0) and set 6 = 14 reps to failure (vs W10 Tue's 11). Hold 30 — don't bump on soft openers (Adj #127)
All 4 sets landed inside the 12-15 band, set 2 hit 15 (not just the last set) — best within-band consistency of the cycle. Hold 30, bump-eligible if it repeats (Adj #117)

Tue-slot 60→65 BUMP LANDED — set 1 RIR 2 = exactly the reserve Adj #118 asked for, sets 2-3 held 10 reps, set 4 dropped to 9 at the prescribed last-set push. Splits from the Sat slot per the §3.A 4×10 vs §3.B 4×12 rep-target mismatch. Hold 65 at Tue (Adj #128)

Even the Tue-clean 60 (10/10/10/10, Adj #109) only produced 6/6 at the Sat 4×12 ask after a 65×12/6 opener; the Adj #128 Tue-slot bump does NOT transfer here. Hold 60 at Sat; re-attempt 65 only on a Sat-slot 60 outing clean with reps to spare, and target RIR 1-2 on set 1 (Adj #118/#128)

Third straight outing at 22.5 with the same 12/12/12/6 shape — sets 1-3 hold the floor with set 3 to failure, set 4 collapses to 6. Hold-until-clean NOT met → hold 22.5. Elbow reported this time — very minor during WU, resolved after 1st bench work set = under §10.A drop threshold but not fully symptom-free → 4-wk clock stays reset (Adj #129)

Running soft — RIR 4/4 vs the Adj #95/#112 landing (W10 Tue 130 set-1 RIR 3 = the prescribed RPE 7 / RIR 3 target), second consecutive week of softening (W10 3/1 → W11 4/4). Bump-eligible 135 next Tue as an Adj #95-style one-step intensity correction, role unchanged joint-health (Adj #130)

345 set 1 clean (12 reps RIR 1) then collapsed; backoff to the proven-clean 335 also failed both sets (11/8, both RIR 0), well below its 12/12/12/12 mark. AM Achilles clean W11 Tue 6/30 (Adj #132) but not a lift-day AM — re-attempt 345 only on a clean AM reported on the actual Sat lift day. Hold 335 (Adj #120)

currentLoads.load: BW (Tue) → add small load next Tue (~10 lb DB / 25 lb plate); Sat still BW
currentLoads.note: Tue-slot add-load gate MET — set 3 RIR 2 clean, openers RIR 3 = real headroom (vs W10 Tue's RIR 3/2/0 which cratered set 3). Add small load next Tue at §3.A 3×12, target set 3 ≥RIR 1-2. Sat slot (§3.B 3×10) gate still separately open (Adj #122) — hold BW at Sat until proven (Adj #131)
Both sets to true failure — regression from last week's clean RIR 2/1; likely late-circuit/whole-session fatigue given today's broader pattern. Hold 130, no bump (Adj #121)
